name: apollo-mcp
description: Apollo.io lead enrichment and prospecting via MCP. Search people and companies, enrich contacts, and automate sales prospecting workflows.

tools.name: search_people
tools.description: Search for people/contacts by criteria like job title, company, location

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search for companies by industry, size, location, revenue

tools.name: enrich_person
tools.description: Enrich a person's profile with additional data from Apollo

tools.name: enrich_company
tools.description: Enrich a company's profile with additional data from Apollo
